name: Hopping John
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Rotel diced tomatoes and green chiles (red, kidney, pinto, black eyed peas, chili beans in sauce, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon until crisp. Drain and set aside.
2. Drain the beans and set aside.
3. Sauté onions in 1 tablespoon of bacon grease until they start to soften. Use a slightly higher heat to caramelize them for added color and flavor.
4. Stir in rice, water, salt, hot pepper sauce, and 1 can of Rotel's tomatoes. Bring to boil over medium heat, stirring frequently to prevent the rice from burning at the bottom.
5. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook for 10 minutes.
6. Add the beans and the last can of Rotel tomatoes. Stir thoroughly.
7. Cover and turn off the heat. Let set for 15 minutes.
8. Sprinkle crumbled bacon over top after serving.
